description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding shelving unit with a modern, minimalist design. The front features two open shelves divided vertically at the center, providing four compartments for storage or display. The sides and top are finished in a matte black color, while the back panel is a contrasting wood grain, adding visual interest and warmth. The legs are slim and straight, elevating the unit slightly off the ground and giving it a light, airy appearance. The overall construction appears to be wood or engineered wood, with no visible doors, handles, or glass panels. This piece would be suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, lobbies, garages, or public waiting areas.
description: A modern, open-shelved cabinet with a matte black finish and a wood grain back panel, divided into four compartments. It stands on slim legs and has a minimalist, functional design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves divided into four compartments, with a matte black finish.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid, flat black side panel and slim leg.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the wood grain back panel and the overall rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid black panel and slim leg.
